Accordingly, AURA also uses a proprietary woven glass ﬁbre matrix diaphragm for the midrange and bass cones terminated by high-ﬂexibility rubber surrounds. Wharfedale were one of the ﬁrst domestic speaker manufacturers to utilise a crossover to divide the frequency band between drive units that were each optimised for bass, midrange and treble. ## AURA Cabinet. The Wharfedale AURA series comes in the form of AURA 1 and 2 stand-mount options.
